symptoms: The iOS app gets killed with SIGKILL 0x8badf00d after a background intent finishes execution
Selecting Bluetooth audio inputs unexpectedly stops background music streams
List reordering or drag-and-drop operations suffer from artificial post-interaction delays
UI components jump or shift shapes noticeably when entering an active interaction or context menu state
An interactive sheet freezes or behaves weirdly because dismiss animations were programmatically disabled
Audio recording fails to start instantly when triggered from the hardware Action Button.
Background music in AirPods stutters or drops briefly when initiating or stopping a recording.
A parallel long-recording session gets unexpectedly terminated when a short dictation session ends.
An interrupted recording file becomes corrupted or missing after the app is force-quit by iOS.
Consent or confirm cards for server commands remain stuck on the screen after reconnecting to the host.
Diagnostic script blames VPN for iPhone unreachability when the actual cause is missing XcodeSystemResources.pkg after Xcode update
Script closes Xcode on exit even though the user had started it before the diagnostic run
Diagnostic verdict oscillates between different root causes on repeated runs due to timing-dependent state checks
VPN tunnel information is presented as culprit in verdict_action without a specific positive test proving VPN caused the observable error
Script outputs multiple possible causes instead of running deterministic tests to isolate the actual failure mechanism
Live Activity renders in Notification Center and Lock Screen but Dynamic Island compact slot is empty
Live Activity pop-out banner never appears despite calling Activity.request() or update() with AlertConfiguration
Activity.update() or end() crashes with 'Cannot update dismissed Activity' exception mid-lifecycle
Multiple concurrent Live Activities: system hides ours in Dynamic Island because relevanceScore defaults to 0
Live Activity created from Shortcut in background but notification is suppressed when app comes to foreground
User cannot wake Mac from sleep using iPhone app button despite multiple attempts
Mac status shows unavailable or asleep when actually powered on and connected to network
TCP connection refused on port 22 incorrectly interpreted as Mac being in sleep state
MAC address in app settings no longer matches actual Wi-Fi address after Private Wi-Fi Address enabled
IP address used for WoL becomes invalid after DHCP lease renewal, Mac shows unreachable next day
Broadcast magic packet fails with errno 65 even though Wi-Fi is connected on free Apple ID deployment
ARP table shows incomplete entry for sleeping Mac, unicast magic packets work for 5 minutes then silently fail
Widget text becomes white and unreadable when user enables monochrome/tinted theme on home screen
Widget shows stale habit data after updating through the main app, even though data was saved
Widget content appears cramped or has excessive margins on Small (2×2) widget size
Tapping widget opens the app but does not navigate to the Habits tab
Habit names are cut off with ellipsis even though there is visible space available
Liquid Glass effect becomes blurry and illegible at widget edges
Widget stops updating after App Group data is modified, requiring force-refresh
Dragging habits shows frame drops (30fps instead of 120fps) or visible stutter during gesture tracking
Day-of-week column headers flicker or flutter briefly when expanding/collapsing habit groups
Long-press takes >0.3s to respond, edit sheet appears with noticeable delay
Scrolling becomes unresponsive or stops working when attempting to drag a habit row
Reordered habit ends up at wrong position with offset of +N rows, especially after scrolling
Microphone selection in UI shows one device but actual recording captures from a different device (e.g., picker shows AirPods selected but iPhone audio is captured)
Recording quality changes dramatically when Bluetooth device connects or disconnects mid-record — audio becomes chipmunk-pitched or slow-motion
Picker UI freezes for 1–3 seconds when switching between microphone devices or when opening Voice tab (blocking audio route configuration)
After system interruption (incoming call, Siri activation), microphone stops capturing even though AVAudioSession reports active state, app restart required
Selecting specific built-in microphone position (bottom/front/back) in UI has no effect or reverts immediately — always records from default bottom microphone
Activity visible in Notification Center and Lock Screen but Dynamic Island compact area is blank despite activityState=.active
Activity appears in Island on Activity.request() but disappears from compact after first update() call with relevanceScore unset
SwiftUI faults in compact/minimal closures (animation, ProgressView, onAppear side effects) cause SpringBoard to silently unmount Island view entirely
Pop-out animation banner does not appear even after Activity.update() with AlertConfiguration when app is in foreground
Timer shows 27:00 instead of 0:00 after adopting an existing persistent Activity that was idle for minutes
Activity shifts from Dynamic Island compact to minimal side slot once user starts recording (mic system claim takes precedence)
Notification Center takes 4-6 seconds to update activity name and timer after Activity.update() without alertConfiguration
iOS automatically unmounts Activity from Island when SwiftUI view closure contains forced unwrapping, missing image assets, or indeterminate ProgressView
Dev mode toggle doesn't apply immediately, loading Prod URL instead
Extra dark gap / margin below the text input field in the embedded web chat view on iOS
Blank white screen flashes when loading or refreshing the webview in dark mode
iOS webview fails to connect to local dev server silently without triggering a local network access dialog
Switching tabs in the app forces the web page to reload and lose its state or scroll position
Raw API or session token is visible in the URL input bar during address editing
Widget does not appear in iOS gallery or fails with process control error code 8
App freezes or stutters for up to a second after tapping merge or delete on voice records
Haptic feedback or vibration is completely silent while microphone recording is active
AI chat input bar floats laggingly or gets stuck under the software keyboard on iOS 26
Build fails immediately with XCBuildData build.db disk I/O error after a canceled deploy run
./deploy.sh fails with 'Unable to find a destination matching' when iPhone is in WiFi but CoreDevice tunnel is unavailable
7-day provisioning profile countdown does not reset after rebuild — xcodebuild reuses old cached profile even when fresh renewal is expected
Installation fails mid-process with 'com.apple.dt.CoreDeviceError error 3002' or 'IXRemoteErrorDomain error 5' on first install after Xcode wake
iPhone is not listed in available deployment destinations after Mac reboot or major iOS update
xcodebuild refuses to compile for physical iPhone when no iOS Simulator runtime is installed, despite simulator not being required for deployment
App crashes 2–7 seconds after stopping recording via Action Button or Control Center, new process cold-launches with history counter increment
AppIntent continuation fatal error 'CheckedContinuation must only be resumed once' in perform() context
Recording state becomes out-of-sync when intent-triggered stop runs during willEnterForeground reconciliation
Clipboard paste returns empty after background voice recording stop, text appears only after returning to app
ActivityKit update or end throws exception when system dismisses Live Activity during intent execution
Background audio playback pauses for ~1 second immediately after voice recording stop due to hardware audio graph reconfiguration
Voice recording gets stuck in 'Stopping...' state or truncates the final 20-30 seconds of audio tail
Background voice recording triggered via Action Button or Shortcut gets terminated by iOS after 15 seconds
App crashes with SIGKILL / 0x8badf00d watchdog error shortly after finishing a background recording
App actions or shortcuts appear as 'Unknown Action' or are missing inside the iOS Shortcuts app
Attempting to reorder items in the History sheet accidentally triggers the sheet pull-to-dismiss gesture
Playback speed resets back to 1.0x every time audio is paused and resumed in the history player
Scribble re-transcription (ReloadSession) runs indefinitely and never completes or displays results
Mac is out of disk space; Xcode cache (iOS DeviceSupport, DerivedData) consumed 30–50 GB
iPhone symbol copying takes 15+ minutes or interrupted by WiFi; doesn't resume properly and starts from 0%
External SSD with symlinked Xcode folders disconnected or died; xcode-select is broken, builds fail
Unsure if iOS DeviceSupport can be safely moved to external disk via symlink or if it breaks Xcode
Simulator runtimes (APFS volumes on Xcode 16+) can't be symlinked and are eating 20+ GB on internal disk
Transitioning to AI Chat tab from Voice screen fails or shows the previous conversation
Keyboard hides the message composer input field or animates out of sync on iOS 26
Swiping to open the history drawer triggers unintended item clicks or scrolls vertically instead of sliding
Custom toolbar buttons on iOS 26 show unexpected double borders or circular background wrapping
Draft text and file attachments in the composer are lost when sending fails due to offline states
Xcode shows yellow banner 'The developer disk image could not be mounted on this device'
devicectl prints 'No provider was found' error after Xcode update
iPhone appears as 'connected (no DDI)' in devicectl list devices, wireless deployment unavailable
Run button in Xcode is grayed out or crashes when deploying to iPhone
Wireless deployment breaks after Xcode update but device pairing is intact
